sequenceDiagram(name = "User Login") {
    val user = lifeline(name = "User") { isActor = true }
    val loginInterface = lifeline(name = "Login Interface")
    val authService = lifeline(name = "Authentication Service")
    val userDB = lifeline(name = "User Database")
    message(from = user, to = loginInterface, label = "enterCredentials()")
    message(from = loginInterface, to = authService, label = "verifyCredentials()")
    message(from = authService, to = userDB, label = "loadRecord()")
    reply(from = userDB, to = authService, label = "userRecordWithHash")
    reply(from = authService, to = loginInterface, label = "accessToken")
    reply(from = loginInterface, to = user, label = "loginSuccess()")
}

@startuml
actor User
participant "Login Interface" as LI
participant "Authentication Service" as AS
participant "User Database" as DB

User -> LI : Enters credentials
LI -> AS : verify(username, password)
AS -> DB : loadRecord(username)
DB --> AS : userRecord (with hash)
' AS verifies password hash internally
AS --> LI : accessToken
LI --> User : Login successful
@enduml

sequenceDiagram
  actor User
  participant LoginInterface
  participant AuthService
  participant UserDB
  User->>LoginInterface: Enter Credentials
  LoginInterface->>AuthService: Verify Credentials(username, password)
  AuthService->>UserDB: Load User Record(username)
  UserDB-->>AuthService: User Record (with hash)
  Note right of AuthService: Verify password hash
  AuthService-->>LoginInterface: Access Token
  LoginInterface-->>User: Login Successful

sequenceDiagram(name = "BankTransfer") {
    val customer = lifeline(name = "Bank Customer") { isActor = true }
    val app = lifeline(name = "Banking App")
    val transferService = lifeline(name = "Transfer Service")
    val accountDb = lifeline(name = "Account Database")
    message(from = customer, to = app, label = "initiateTransfer()")
    message(from = app, to = transferService, label = "submitTransferRequest()")
    message(from = transferService, to = accountDb, label = "queryBalance()")
    reply(from = accountDb, to = transferService, label = "balance")
    message(from = transferService, to = accountDb, label = "postTransfer()")
    reply(from = accountDb, to = transferService, label = "bookingConfirmation")
    reply(from = transferService, to = app, label = "transactionReferenceNumber")
    reply(from = app, to = customer, label = "displayConfirmation")
}

@startuml
actor Customer
participant "Banking App"
participant "Transfer Service"
participant "Account Database"

Customer -> "Banking App" : initiateTransfer()
"Banking App" -> "Transfer Service" : submitTransferRequest()
"Transfer Service" -> "Account Database" : getBalance()
"Account Database" --> "Transfer Service" : currentBalance
"Transfer Service" -> "Account Database" : postTransfer()
"Account Database" --> "Transfer Service" : success
"Transfer Service" --> "Banking App" : transactionReferenceNumber
"Banking App" --> Customer : displayConfirmation()
@enduml

sequenceDiagram(name = "WebShopSearch") {
    val buyer = lifeline(name = "Buyer") { isActor = true }
    val webShop = lifeline(name = "Web Shop")
    val searchService = lifeline(name = "Search Service")
    val productCatalog = lifeline(name = "Product Catalog")

    message(from = buyer, to = webShop, label = "enters search term")
    message(from = webShop, to = searchService, label = "search(term)")
    message(from = searchService, to = productCatalog, label = "findProducts(term)")
    reply(from = productCatalog, to = searchService, label = "productList")
    reply(from = searchService, to = webShop, label = "resultsList")
    message(from = webShop, to = productCatalog, label = "getImages(productIds)")
    reply(from = productCatalog, to = webShop, label = "imageList")
    reply(from = webShop, to = buyer, label = "displays results page")
}

sequenceDiagram
    actor Buyer
    participant "Web Shop" as WS
    participant "Search Service" as SS
    participant "Product Catalog" as PC

    Buyer->>WS: Enters search term
    WS->>SS: search(term)
    SS->>PC: findProducts(term)
    PC-->>SS: product list
    SS-->>WS: results list

    alt results found
        WS->>PC: loadImages(product_ids)
        PC-->>WS: images
    end

    WS-->>Buyer: Displays results page

@startuml
actor Buyer
participant "Web Shop"
participant "Search Service"
participant "Product Catalog"

Buyer -> "Web Shop" : enters search term
"Web Shop" -> "Search Service" : findProducts(term)
"Search Service" -> "Product Catalog" : find(term)
"Product Catalog" --> "Search Service" : product list
"Search Service" --> "Web Shop" : results list

alt results found
    "Web Shop" -> "Product Catalog" : getImagesFor(product_ids)
    "Product Catalog" --> "Web Shop" : product images
end

"Web Shop" --> Buyer : display results page
@enduml

sequenceDiagram
    actor Customer
    participant Shop
    participant CheckoutService
    participant PaymentGateway
    participant Database

    Customer->>Shop: Initiate Checkout
    Shop->>CheckoutService: Process Checkout
    CheckoutService->>PaymentGateway: Verify Payment Details

    alt Payment Details are Valid
        PaymentGateway-->>CheckoutService: Details OK
        CheckoutService->>Database: Save Order
        Database-->>CheckoutService: Order Saved
        CheckoutService->>PaymentGateway: Process Payment
        PaymentGateway-->>CheckoutService: Payment Successful
        CheckoutService-->>Shop: Checkout Successful
        Shop-->>Customer: Display Success Message
    else Payment Details are Invalid
        PaymentGateway-->>CheckoutService: Details Invalid
        CheckoutService-->>Shop: Checkout Rejected (Error)
        Shop-->>Customer: Display Error Message
    end

edges: CS -> Shop : error: invalid payment details (reply)

participant "Backend Service" as Backend

loop up to 3 retries
    Client -> Gateway : Request data

        Backend --> Gateway : Data
        Gateway --> Client : Data

        Gateway --> Client : 429 Too Many Requests
        note over Client: Wait backoff period
    end
end

@startuml
actor Customer
participant "Order Service" as OS
participant "Saga Orchestrator" as SO
participant "Event Log" as EL
participant "Warehouse Service" as WS
participant "Payment Service" as PS
participant "Shipment Service" as SS

Customer -> OS : Place Order
activate OS

create SO
OS -> SO : Start Saga
activate SO

SO -> EL : Log(Saga Started)
SO -> WS : ReserveItems()
activate WS
WS --> SO : result
deactivate WS

alt Goods Available
    SO -> EL : Log(Items Reserved)
    SO -> PS : ExecutePayment()
    activate PS
    PS --> SO : result
    deactivate PS

    alt Payment Succeeded
        SO -> EL : Log(Payment Succeeded)
        SO -> SS : CommissionShipment()
        activate SS
        SS --> SO : result
        deactivate SS
        SO -> EL : Log(Shipment Commissioned)
        SO -> EL : Log(Saga Completed)
        SO --> OS : Order Success
        destroy SO
        OS --> Customer : Order Confirmed
        deactivate OS

    else Payment Failed
        SO -> EL : Log(Payment Failed)
        SO -> WS : CancelReservation()
        activate WS
        WS --> SO : result
        deactivate WS
        SO -> EL : Log(Reservation Cancelled)
        SO -> EL : Log(Saga Aborted)
        SO --> OS : Order Failed
        destroy SO
        OS --> Customer : Order Failed (Payment)
        deactivate OS
    end

else Goods Not Available
    SO -> EL : Log(Saga Aborted)
    SO --> OS : Order Failed
    destroy SO
    OS --> Customer : Order Failed (Out of Stock)
    deactivate OS
end
@enduml

SessionStore --> AuthServer : sessionID

    AuthServer -> Browser : Redirect with authorization code
    Browser -> Client : callback(code)

        AuthServer --> ResourceServer : token valid
        ResourceServer --> Client : user data

    AuthServer --> Browser : Deliver error message
    Browser --> User : Display error message

actor Driver
participant Camera
participant Radar
participant "Fusion Unit" as FU
participant "Emergency Braking Assistant" as EBA
participant "Control Unit" as CU
participant "Diagnostic Log" as Log

Camera -> FU : measurementData
& Radar -> FU : measurementData

FU -> EBA : report(collisionRisk, timeToCollision)

alt timeToCollision < criticalThreshold
    EBA -> Driver : acousticWarning()
    EBA -> CU : initiateBraking()
    loop until vehicle stationary
        EBA -> CU : adjustBrakePressure()
    end
    EBA -> CU : endManeuver()
    EBA -> Log : recordEvent("Critical Braking")
else timeToCollision >= criticalThreshold
    EBA -> Driver : showDistanceWarning()
    EBA -> Log : logRisk(collisionRisk)
end

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "BicycleModel") {
    val frame = partDef(name = "Frame")
    val crank = partDef(name = "Crank")
    val chain = partDef(name = "Chain")
    val rearWheel = partDef(name = "RearWheel")
    val handlebars = partDef(name = "Handlebars")
    val frontWheel = partDef(name = "FrontWheel")
    val brakingSystem = partDef(name = "BrakingSystem")

    val drivetrain = partDef(name = "Drivetrain") {
        part(name = "crank", typeId = crank.id)
        part(name = "chain", typeId = chain.id)
        part(name = "rearWheel", typeId = rearWheel.id)
    }

    val steeringAssembly = partDef(name = "SteeringAssembly") {
        part(name = "handlebars", typeId = handlebars.id)
        part(name = "frontWheel", typeId = frontWheel.id)
    }

    val bicycleSystem = partDef(name = "BicycleSystem") {
        part(name = "frame", typeId = frame.id)
        part(name = "drivetrain", typeId = drivetrain.id)
        part(name = "steering", typeId = steeringAssembly.id)
        part(name = "braking", typeId = brakingSystem.id)
    }

    bdd(name = "Bicycle BDD") {
        include(bicycleSystem)
        include(frame)
        include(drivetrain)
        include(steeringAssembly)
        include(brakingSystem)
        include(crank)
        include(chain)
        include(rearWheel)
        include(handlebars)
        include(frontWheel)
    }
}

import dev.kuml.sysml2.dsl.sysml2Model

sysml2Model(name = "EarthObservationSatelliteModel") {
    // Payload Components
    val payloadInstrument = partDef(name = "Payload Instrument", isAbstract = true)
    val opticalCamera = partDef(name = "Optical Camera")
    val sarRadar = partDef(name = "SAR Radar")

    // Structure and Thermal Control Components
    val primaryStructure = partDef(name = "Primary Structure")
    val solarPanels = partDef(name = "Solar Panels")
    val heatShield = partDef(name = "Heat Shield")

    // Electrical Power Supply Components
    val batteryArray = partDef(name = "Battery Array")
    val solarPowerRegulator = partDef(name = "Solar Power Regulator")
    val pdu = partDef(name = "PDU")

    // AOCS Components
    val starSensor = partDef(name = "Star Sensor")
    val reactionWheels = partDef(name = "Reaction Wheels")
    val thrusters = partDef(name = "Thrusters")

    // TT&C Components
    val onBoardComputer = partDef(name = "On-Board Computer")
    val rfTransmitter = partDef(name = "RF Transmitter")
    val rfReceiver = partDef(name = "RF Receiver")

    // Relationships
    generalization(specificId = opticalCamera.id, generalId = payloadInstrument.id)
    generalization(specificId = sarRadar.id, generalId = payloadInstrument.id)

    // Subsystem Definitions
    val payloadSubsystem = partDef(name = "Payload Subsystem") {
        part(name = "camera", typeId = opticalCamera.id)
        part(name = "radar", typeId = sarRadar.id)
    }
    val structureAndThermalControl = partDef(name = "Structure and Thermal Control") {
        part(name = "structure", typeId = primaryStructure.id)
        part(name = "panels", typeId = solarPanels.id)
        part(name = "shield", typeId = heatShield.id)
    }
    val electricalPowerSupply = partDef(name = "Electrical Power Supply") {
        part(name = "battery", typeId = batteryArray.id)
        part(name = "regulator", typeId = solarPowerRegulator.id)
        part(name = "pdu", typeId = pdu.id)
    }
    val aocs = partDef(name = "AOCS") {
        part(name = "sensor", typeId = starSensor.id)
        part(name = "wheels", typeId = reactionWheels.id)
        part(name = "thrusters", typeId = thrusters.id)
    }
    val ttc = partDef(name = "TT&C") {
        part(name = "obc", typeId = onBoardComputer.id)
        part(name = "tx", typeId = rfTransmitter.id)
        part(name = "rx", typeId = rfReceiver.id)
    }

    // Top-Level System
    val earthObservationSatellite = partDef(name = "Earth Observation Satellite") {
        part(name = "payload", typeId = payloadSubsystem.id)
        part(name = "structure", typeId = structureAndThermalControl.id)
        part(name = "power", typeId = electricalPowerSupply.id)
        part(name = "aocs", typeId = aocs.id)
        part(name = "ttc", typeId = ttc.id)
    }

    bdd(name = "Earth Observation Satellite BDD") {
        include(earthObservationSatellite)
        include(payloadSubsystem)
        include(structureAndThermalControl)
        include(electricalPowerSupply)
        include(aocs)
        include(ttc)
        include(payloadInstrument)
        include(opticalCamera)
        include(sarRadar)
        include(primaryStructure)
        include(solarPanels)
        include(heatShield)
        include(batteryArray)
        include(solarPowerRegulator)
        include(pdu)
        include(starSensor)
        include(reactionWheels)
        include(thrusters)
        include(onBoardComputer)
        include(rfTransmitter)
        include(rfReceiver)
    }
}

    reply(from = database, to = checkoutService, label = "order saved")
    message(from = checkoutService, to = paymentGateway, label = "processPayment()")
    reply(from = paymentGateway, to = checkoutService, label = "payment successful")
    reply(from = checkoutService, to = shop, label = "Checkout successful")
    reply(from = shop, to = customer, label = "Display result")

sequenceDiagram
    actor Client
    participant "API Gateway" as GW
    participant "Rate Limiter" as RL
    participant "Backend Service" as BE

    Client->>GW: Request Data
    GW->>RL: Check Quota

    alt Quota Available
        RL-->>GW: OK
        GW->>BE: Forward Request
        BE-->>GW: Data
        GW-->>Client: Data
    else Quota Exhausted
        RL-->>GW: Exhausted
        GW-->>Client: Reject (Too Many Requests)
        loop 3 Retries
            note right of Client: Wait backoff period
            Client->>GW: Retry Request
            GW->>RL: Check Quota
            RL-->>GW: Exhausted
            GW-->>Client: Reject (Too Many Requests)
        end
    end
